title: Game Phase 3 â€” Living Office
description: Transform the pixel-art office from a static display into a living, interactive game. Data-driven agents, player-controlled CEO, context-aware spatial behavior, interactive elements, and game-feel HUD.

in: Z-sort rendering fix for furniture/character overlap
Real-time data binding from Zustand store to game characters
Character identity: names, status indicators, gender matching
Context-aware spatial behavior with room zone routing
Enhanced game HUD header with notifications
Research note on game UX patterns for future features
out: Tiled map redesign (use zone definitions on existing 32x32 map)

initiatives.title: Fix Z-Sort and Rendering Order
initiatives.scope: Fix FurnitureInstance.zY in layoutSerializer.ts so up-facing chairs render behind seated characters. Audit all ZDrawable sorting in renderer.ts for edge cases.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: FurnitureInstance.zY correctly computed so characters in up-facing chairs render in front
All 25 seats visually verified â€” no character-behind-furniture clipping
No regressions in existing z-sort for desks, monitors, and other furniture

initiatives.notes: NOT DONE. GID tile layers render flat before characters â€” no z-interleaving. Characters cover desks/chairs. Needs Tiled map restructuring: desk front-edge and chair-back tiles must be in a dedicated 'above-player' layer. Code-only approaches (layer promotion, z-sort) failed because the same tile needs to be in front of one character and behind another. Requires editing the TMX source and re-exporting layers.

initiatives.title: Bind Game Characters to Real System State
initiatives.scope: Map real Zustand session states to CharacterState. Add debounce/smoothing layer for rapid state changes. Make context data available on Character.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: Agent sprites reflect real session state from Zustand store
State transitions are debounced â€” rapid updates don't cause visual jitter
Context data (task name, session info) available on Character object

initiatives.notes: Was broken: all agents showed 'offline' because (1) session-scanner had 2MB scan limit missing Agent tool calls in long conversations, (2) GamePage filtered out isSubagent sessions. Fixed 2026-03-05: removed scan limit, removed isSubagent filter, added priority-based status merging.

initiatives.title: Character Identity, Names, and Status Indicators
initiatives.scope: Add agent name labels and status indicator icons above character sprites. Match agent genders to personas. Simple canvas fillText for names, small sprite/shape for indicators.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: Agent names displayed above character sprites, legible at default zoom
Status indicators visible: spinner (working), zzz (idle), exclamation (error), speech bubble (discussion)
Indicators animate smoothly using game loop, not React effects

initiatives.title: CEO Player-Controlled Character
initiatives.scope: Add CEO to agent-registry.json. Implement WASD keyboard input and click-to-move via A* pathfinding. Camera follows CEO. Uses existing Character FSM.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: CEO character appears in office with distinct sprite
WASD keys move CEO tile-by-tile with walking animation
Click-to-move sends CEO to clicked tile via A* pathfinding
Camera smoothly follows CEO character
CEO collides with walls and furniture correctly

initiatives.title: Context-Aware Spatial Behavior for Agents
initiatives.scope: Define room zones as tile-coordinate ranges. Implement 4 routing rules: codingâ†’desk, discussionâ†’meeting, infraâ†’server, idleâ†’break. Add linger timer and busy indicator.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: Room zones defined as tile-coordinate ranges (desks, meeting, server, break)
Agents route to contextually appropriate room based on session type
Agents linger 2-5s after short tasks before moving
Busy indicator shown when agent has multiple concurrent tasks

initiatives.title: Smooth Movement and Animation Transitions
initiatives.scope: Ensure smooth tile-to-tile interpolation. All movement timers in game loop deltaTime. Fix any teleporting behavior.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: Characters interpolate smoothly between tiles during movement
Walking speed feels natural
All movement timers use game loop deltaTime, zero useEffect timers

initiatives.title: Enhanced Game HUD Header
initiatives.scope: Enhance GameHeader.tsx with date/time, notification badges, quick-access buttons. Dark themed HTML bar above canvas.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: GameHeader shows current date/time
Notification badges show counts for active sessions and pending directives
Quick-access buttons open relevant SidePanel views
Dark theme consistent with game aesthetic

initiatives.title: Clickable Agents, Desks, and Rooms
initiatives.scope: Extend click handler in CanvasOffice.tsx. Click agents for detail, click desks for reports, hover rooms for tooltip. Follow getCharacterAt pattern.
initiatives.verify: npm run type-check && npm run build

definition_of_done.criterion: Clicking agent sprite opens agent detail in SidePanel
Clicking desk/furniture shows associated agent reports
Hovering over room zone shows tooltip with occupants
Click priority: agent > furniture > room (no conflicts)

initiatives.title: Research Game UX Patterns
initiatives.scope: Study claw-empire and pixel-agents for stealable patterns. Brief research note on future features (day/night, weather, achievements). Max 2 pages.

definition_of_done.criterion: Research note created at .context/goals/game/research-game-patterns.md
Covers pattern analysis and future feature feasibility
